Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Dornoth IV]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 13''' — Dornoth IV is a toxic landscape.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 18''' — The narrator grew up on Dornoth Four.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 22''' — Dornoth Four is a planet with toxic flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 44''' — Dornoth IV is a planet that broadcasts Subline feeds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 44''' — Dornoth IV is a planet littered with the wreckage of early spacefaring vehicles.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 2''' — Dornoth IV is a location within Alliance space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 2''' — Dornoth IV is a location where the Vallenar Corporation has a large presence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 8''' — The Grand Hive appeared outside of Dornoth IV.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 29''' — Dornoth IV holds the title of 'worst planet in the galaxy' (referenced by Murrok).}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 8''' — Dornoth IV is mentioned in a security consultation note.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 10''' — Dornoth IV is the homeworld of the Lichborn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 16''' — Dornoth Four is a location the Lichborn fleet will return to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — Dornoth Four is the location of an orphanage where Sola and Ortila met.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 37''' — Sola's relatives live on Dornoth Four.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
